requested_outcome: Replace with the confirmed project outcome.
constraints: No production actions in the example fixture.
assumptions: Project action definitions are complete before confirmation.
risks: A project-specific rollback action must be verified before deployment.
success_conditions: Every mandatory Acceptance criterion has valid stage-bound evidence.
failure_conditions: A protected or external mutation starts without a gate and authorization.

goals.statement: Deliver one independently verified project change.

requirements.statement: The example change must pass project verification.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The full_verify action succeeds in an isolated candidate.

decisions.statement: Release and deployment remain required in this complete fake fixture.

safety_constraints: Workers cannot write protected refs, runtime state, or credentialed delivery actions.
non_goals: The fixture does not contact a real provider or environment.
